CheckTitle: RDS クラスターs have IAM authentication enabled.をチェックします
Description: RDS クラスターs have IAM authentication enabled.をチェックします
Risk: the IAM Database Authentication featureが有効です for your RDS データベース clusters in order to use the Identity and Access Management (IAM) service to manage データベース access to your MySQL and PostgreSQL データベース clusters. With this feature enabled, you don't have to use a password when you connect to your MySQL/PostgreSQL データベース, instead you can use an authentication token. An authentication token is a unique string of characters with a lifetime of 15 minutes that Amazon RDS generates on your request. IAM Database Authentication removes the need of storing user credentials within the データベース configuration, because authentication is managed externally using Amazon IAM.を確認します

Recommendation.Text: Enable IAM authentication for supported RDS クラスターs.
